Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec

Class AbstractResource

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.BaseClass
      • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec.AbstractResource
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    EmbedResourceImpl, GenerationResourceImpl, ModelResourceImpl
    public abstract class AbstractResource
extends BaseClass
    Abstract base class for resource implementations, providing shared functionality.
    Since:
    0.0.1
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractResource

        public AbstractResource​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
        Constructs a new AbstractResource with the required GeminiClient.
        Parameters:
        geminiClient - The GeminiClient instance to use for API communication.

    • Method Detail

      • get

        protected HttpResponse get​(String endpoint,
                           Map<String,​String> headers)
                    throws GeminiApiException
        Makes a GET request to the specified endpoint and handles potential errors.
        Parameters:
        endpoint - The API endpoint to request.
        headers - The headers to include in the request.
        Returns:
        The HttpResponse object.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the request.

      • post

        protected HttpResponse post​(String endpoint,
                            String body,
                            Map<String,​String> headers)
                     throws GeminiApiException
        Makes a POST request to the specified endpoint and handles potential errors.
        Parameters:
        endpoint - The API endpoint to request.
        body - The request body.
        headers - The headers to include in the request.
        Returns:
        The HttpResponse object.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the request.

      • getModelTool

        protected ModelTool getModelTool()
